responses: Hello! How can I assist you today? 😊
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Hey! Great to see you. How can I help?
Greetings! I'm here to help you.
Goodbye! Have a wonderful day! 👋
See you later! Take care!
Bye! Don't hesitate to come back if you need help.
Farewell! It was great talking to you.
You're welcome! 😊
Happy to help! Is there anything else?
Anytime! That's what I'm here for.
Glad I could help! Feel free to ask more.
I'm a multilingual chatbot! I can chat with you in English, Hindi, and Kannada. Ask me about weather, jokes, facts, health tips, and more!
I can help you with: 💬 Casual conversation, 🌍 Language switching (English/Hindi/Kannada), 😄 Jokes and fun facts, 💡 General knowledge, ❤️ Health and wellness tips.
I'm LinguaBot — an AI-powered multilingual chatbot built with TensorFlow and Flask. I speak English, Hindi (हिन्दी), and Kannada (ಕನ್ನಡ)! 🤖
I'm LinguaBot! I use deep learning (Bidirectional LSTM) to understand your intent and respond intelligently in 3 languages.
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything! 😄
I told my computer I needed a break. Now it won't stop sending me Kit-Kat ads. 🍫
Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs! 🐛
What do you call a fake noodle? An Impasta! 🍝
Why did the math book look so sad? Because it had too many problems! 📚
I can't access real-time weather data, but you can check https://weather.com or Google 'weather [your city]' for the latest forecast! 🌤️
For live weather updates, try asking your phone's assistant or visit weather.com. I hope it's sunny where you are! ☀️
I don't have real-time access, but your device's clock is always accurate! 🕐
Check the clock on your device for the exact time! ⏰
I don't have real-time access to the calendar, but you can check your device for today's date! 📅
Your device's calendar will have today's date. Hope it's a great day! 🗓️
Great health habits: 🥗 Eat balanced meals, 💧 Drink 8 glasses of water daily, 🏃 Exercise 30 min/day, 😴 Get 7-8 hours of sleep, 🧘 Practice mindfulness.
Top wellness tips: Stay hydrated, eat more vegetables and fruits, take regular walks, limit screen time, and don't skip sleep! 💪
Top study tips: 📚 Use the Pomodoro technique (25 min study, 5 min break), practice active recall, teach what you learn, get enough sleep before exams, and stay consistent!
Learning hacks: Spaced repetition works great for memory. Apps like Anki can help. Also, try explaining concepts in your own words — if you can teach it, you know it! 🎓

AI (Artificial Intelligence) is the simulation of human intelligence in machines. Machine Learning is a subset where computers learn from data. Deep learning uses neural networks with many layers — that's how I work! 🤖
Technology is evolving rapidly! AI, quantum computing, blockchain, and AR/VR are shaping the future. What specific technology would you like to know about?

patterns: Feeling on top of the world
responses: That's wonderful to hear! 🎉 Happiness is contagious — keep spreading the good vibes!
Yay! 😄 I'm happy that you're happy! What's making your day so great?
Awesome! Positive energy is the best. Keep smiling! 😊
I'm sorry to hear that. 😢 Remember, tough times don't last. It's okay to feel this way — things will get better. Would you like to talk about it?
Sending you virtual hugs! 🤗 Remember that you're stronger than you think. Take things one step at a time.
I'm here for you. Sometimes just talking helps. What's on your mind?
🌊 Fun fact: The ocean covers 71% of Earth's surface but 95% remains unexplored!
🧠 Fun fact: Your brain generates about 70,000 thoughts per day!
🐙 Fun fact: Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood!
⚡ Fun fact: Lightning strikes Earth about 100 times every second!
🦋 Fun fact: Butterflies taste with their feet — they have taste sensors there!
Aww, thank you! 😊 You're amazing too!
That really makes my circuits happy! 🤖 Thank you!
You're too kind! Keep being awesome! ✨
🍛 Try a classic Dal Tadka with rice — nutritious, delicious, and easy to make! Or how about a fresh vegetable stir-fry with tofu?
🥗 For a quick healthy meal: Greek salad with olive oil, or an avocado toast with eggs! What cuisine do you prefer — Indian, Mediterranean, or something else?
💪 'The secret of getting ahead is getting started.' — Mark Twain. You've got this!
🌟 Every expert was once a beginner. Keep going — your future self will thank you!
🚀 'It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.' — Confucius. Keep moving forward!
I don't have access to live news, but you can check BBC, CNN, or The Hindu for the latest updates! 📰
For breaking news, try Google News or your local news app. I can discuss topics you've read about though! 🗞️

ಖಂಡಿತ! ಈಗ ನಾವು ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡೋಣ. ನಿಮಗೆ ಹೇಗೆ ಸಹಾಯ ಮಾಡಲಿ? 😊
